what_went_well: Existing test infrastructure (fixtures.ts, vitest config, 17 test files) provided strong foundation for E2E spec design
Clear separation between unit tests (existing) and E2E tests (new __tests__/e2e/ directory)
Mock executor pattern already established in runner.test.ts — E2E specs extend this consistently
All 4 spec capabilities validated successfully with openspec validate --strict
Pragmatic approach: no new dependencies, reuse vitest + real tmpdir pattern
what_went_wrong: Initial spec format used ### Section headers instead of ### Requirement: headers — required rewrite for validation
improvement_suggestions: Consider adding a CI integration phase as a follow-up proposal once E2E tests are stable
The original proposal at proposals/foundry-e2e-agent-testing.md could be archived or marked as superseded by this OpenSpec
deviations_from_spec: Simplified from original proposal: dropped @microsoft/tui-test, Docker containers, e2e-orchestrator agent, e2e-summarizer agent — focused on vitest-native E2E tests instead
